title: Ubiquiti UACC-Cable-DoorLockRelay-2P - UniFi Access connecting cable, 2 pair
description: A specially designed 4-wire cable for the UniFi Access system from Ubiquiti and is used to connect an electric or magnetic lock as well as a manual switch (UA-Rescue) to the UniFi Access Hub. The cable is 152.4m long, composed of two pairs of conductors and its white sheath is made of thermoplastic elastomer, which is flexible, soft and pleasant to the touch. Thicker wires have a cross-section of 18AWG and are capable of carrying up to 2A at 36V DC. For a smaller pair it is only 1A at the same… Cable length: 152.4m Wire cross-section: 18 AWG (black, red) and 22 AWG (yellow, white) Sheath: TPE - thermoplastic elastomer, white color
